notes: You need to install Windows Media Foundation.  Follow the directions here:  https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
title: American Fugitive

notes: Requires Media Foundation workaround - see https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
title: American Fugitive

notes: So, I needed to run the sh file from https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install like the other guy. But I also needed to manually copy the mfplat.dll to the games directory as suggested here: https://www.reddit.com/r/SteamPlay/comments/bsx6oi/american_fugitive_and_media_foundation_workaround/
title: American Fugitive

notes:
Requires Media Foundation workaround - see https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

However even after mf is installed the game suffers. Alt tabbing will make the game unresponsive, as is clicking anything while the first menu is loading. Windowed mode does not work; the game also slows down over time and by minute 15 it is sluggish and stuttering. Finally, quitting the game isn't registered by steam which prevents it from restarting without closing steam as well
title: American Fugitive
